content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 15, 2003


C. Ray Drew
Drew Development, LLC
7290 Navajo Road, Suite 207
San Diego, CA 92119

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-074

Dear Mr. Drew:

This letter confirms the receipt of your April 14, 2003, request for advice regarding an unnamed political candidate. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(3)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of the candidate for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your question or provide analysis. Please review enclosed regulation 18329(b)(2)(A) where I have highlighted the requirements for submitting a request for advice.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosure

requirements for submitting a request for advice.
sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice regarding an unnamed political candidate, but the FPPC determined it could not address the question due to jurisdictional limitations.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declined to provide advice because the requestor was not an authorized representative of the candidate in question, as required under California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B).
sections.parsing_notes: Format: ocr; LLM: This is a declination letter, not a full advice letter. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present; document declines jurisdiction based on standing requirements. File number W-03-074 appears to use 'W' prefix, possibly indicating withdrawal or declination status.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requestor sought advice regarding an unnamed political candidate, but the FPPC determined it could not address the question due to jurisdictional limitations.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC declined to provide advice because the requestor was not an authorized representative of the candidate in question, as required under California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B).

embedding.summary: The FPPC declined to provide advice to C. Ray Drew regarding an unnamed political candidate, citing lack of authorization under applicable regulations. The requestor was advised to review the requirements for submitting requests for advice.
